word.definition: Perfunctory is a formal word used to describe something that is done without energy or enthusiasm because of habit or because it is expected.

sports_fact.text: In 2023, St. Louis City SC became the first MLS expansion team to win its conference's regular season in its debut year — and sold out every home match.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Samsung Sparks Tech Selloff Despite Strong Results
market.summary: Oil prices strengthen after attacks on ships in Persian Gulf

quote.text: Logic is a feeble reed, friend. "Logic" proved that airplanes can't fly and that H-bombs won't work and that stones don't fall out of the sky. Logic is a way of saying that anything which didn't happen yesterday won't happen tomorrow.
quote.author: Robert A. Heinlein

history.text: Sliced bread is sold for the first time (on the inventor's 48th birthday) by the Chillicothe Baking Company of Chillicothe, Missouri.
